Name: count
Summary: Counts the number of accumulated items, including  values.

Name: sum
Summary: Computes the sum of all accumulated numeric values.

Name: min
Summary: Tracks the smallest numeric value found during accumulation.

Name: max
Summary: Tracks the greatest numeric value found during accumulation.

Name: first
Summary: Stores the first accumulated item and ignores all subsequent items.

Name: last
Summary: Stores the most recently accumulated item.
